creator: tommyhp2@gmail.com
text:
I'm unable to build print/pecl-pdflib:

root@12amd64v1-default-min:/usr/ports/print/pecl-pdflib # make
===>  php74-pecl-pdflib-4.1.4_1 License PDFlib needs confirmation, but BATCH
is defined.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/print/pecl-pdflib

uname -a
FreeBSD 12amd64v1-default-min 12.1-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p1 #0 r356769M: Wed Jan 15 19:43:27 PST 2020

Please advise.  TIA!
